case_title: CASSORLA, STEVEN VS KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING
CERTFD.MAIL TO MICHAEL TAO MING KWONG RETURNED SIGNED;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CASSORLA, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSORLA, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING $3,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,976.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSORLA, STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 25431 ON 4/16/98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSORLA, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG, MICHAEL TAO MING $4,832.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,858.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 9-23-98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25431, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
